title: Bala ji Chalisa
intro: Shri Bala Ji Chalisa: Full Path, Meaning, and Benefits - Hymn to Lord Bala Ji
description:
Doha
  Shri Guru Charan Chitlay, Ke Dhare Dhyan Hanuman.
  Balaji Chalisa Likhe, Das Sanehi Kalyan.
  Vishva Vidit Var Daani, Sankat Haran Hanuman.
  Mehndipur Mein Pragat Bhaye, Balaji Bhagwan.
  
  Chaupai
  Jai Hanuman Balaji Deva.
  Pragat Bhaye Yahan Teeno Deva.
  Pretraj Bhairav Balwana.
  Kotwal Kaptani Hanumana.
  Mehndipur Avtar Liya Hai.
  Bhakton Ka Uddhar Kiya Hai.
  Baalroop Pragte Hain Yahan Par.
  Sankat Wale Aate Jahan Par.
  Dakni Shakni Aru Jindni.
  Mashan Chudail Bhoot Bhutni.
  Jaake Bhay Te Sab Bhaag Jaate.
  Sayane Bhopa Yahan Ghabrate.
  Chauki Bandhan Sab Kat Jaate.
  Doot Mile Anand Manate.
  Sachha Hai Darbar Tihara.
  Sharan Pade Sukh Paave Bhara.
  Roop Tej Bal Atulit Dhama.
  Sanmukh Jinke Siya Rama.
  Kanak Mukut Mani Tej Prakasha.
  Sabki Hovat Purna Aasha.
  Mahant Ganeshpuri Gunile.
  Bhaye Sevak Ram Rangile.
  Adbhut Kala Dikhayi Kaisi.
  Kalyug Jyoti Jalai Jaisi.
  Unchi Dhwaja Pataka Nabh Mein.
  Swarna Kalash Hain Unnat Jag Mein.
  Dharm Satya Ka Danka Baaje.
  Siyaram Jai Shankar Raje.
  Aan Phiraya Mugdar Ghota.
  Bhoot Jind Par Padte Sota.
  Ram Lakshman Siya Hriday Kalyana.
  Baal Roop Pragte Hanumana.
  Jai Hanumant Hathile Deva.
  Puri Pariwar Karat Hain Seva.
  Laddu Churma Mishri Meva.
  Arzi Darkhast Lagau Deva.
  Daya Kare Sab Vidhi Balaji.
  Sankat Haran Pragte Balaji.
  Jai Baba Ki Jan Jan Oochare.
  Kotik Jan Tere Aaye Dware.
  Baal Samay Ravi Bhakshahi Leenha.
  Timir May Jag Kinho Teena.
  Devan Vinti Ki Ati Bhari.
  Chhad Diyo Ravi Kasht Nihari.
  Laanghi Udadhi Siya Sudhi Laye.
  Lakshman Hit Sanjeevan Laye.
  Ramanuj Pran Diwakar.
  Shankar Suvan Maa Anjani Chakar.
  Keshari Nandan Dukh Bhav Bhanjan.
  Ramanand Sada Sukh Sandan.
  Siya Ram Ke Pran Piyare.
  Jab Baba Ki Bhakt Oochare.
  Sankat Dukh Bhanjan Bhagwana.
  Daya Karahu He Kripa Nidhara.
  Sumar Baal Roop Kalyana.
  Kare Manorath Purna Kama.
  Asht Siddhi Nav Nidhi Datari.
  Bhakt Jan Aave Bahu Bhari.
  Meva Aru Mishthan Pravina.
  Bhaint Chadhave Dhani Aru Deena.
  Nritya Kare Nit Nyare Nyare.
  Riddhi Siddhiyan Jaake Dware.
  Arzi Ka Aadesh Milte Hi.
  Bhairav Bhoot Pakadte Tabhi.
  Kotwal Kaptan Kripani.
  Pretraj Sankat Kalyani.
  Chauki Bandhan Katte Bhai.
  Jo Jan Karte Hain Sevakai.
  Ramdas Baal Bhagwanta.
  Mehndipur Pragte Hanumanta.
  Jo Jan Balaji Mein Aate.
  Janam Janam Ke Paap Nashate.
  Jal Paavan Lekar Ghar Jaate.
  Nirmal Ho Anand Manate.
  Kroor Kathin Sankat Bhag Jaave.
  Satya Dharm Path Raah Dikhave.
  Jo Sat Paath Kare Chalisa.
  Taapar Prasann Hoye Bagisa.
  Kalyan Sanehi, Sneh Se Gaave.
  Sukh Samridhi Riddhi Siddhi Paave.
  
  Doha
  Mand Buddhi Mam Jaanke, Kshama Karo Gunkhan.
  Sankat Mochan Kshamahu Mam, Das Sanehi Kalyan.
meaning:
Doha
  Shri Guru Charan Chitlay, Ke Dhare Dhyan Hanuman.
  Fixing my mind on the Guru's feet, I meditate on Lord Hanuman.

  Balaji Chalisa Likhe, Das Sanehi Kalyan.
  Writing this Balaji Chalisa for the well-being of Das Sanehi.

  Vishva Vidit Var Daani, Sankat Haran Hanuman.
  Hanuman is world-renowned as the giver of boons and the destroyer of all troubles.

  Mehndipur Mein Pragat Bhaye, Balaji Bhagwan.
  Lord Balaji has appeared in person at Mehndipur.

  Chaupai
  Jai Hanuman Balaji Deva.
  Victory to Lord Hanuman Balaji.

  Pragat Bhaye Yahan Teeno Deva.
  The three deities (Balaji, Pretraj, and Bhairav) have appeared here.

  Pretraj Bhairav Balwana.
  Pretraj and Bhairav are extremely powerful.

  Kotwal Kaptani Hanumana.
  Hanuman ji resides here as the Kotwal (protector) and Captain.

  Mehndipur Avtar Liya Hai.
  You have taken an avatar in Mehndipur.

  Bhakton Ka Uddhar Kiya Hai.
  And you have uplifted and saved your devotees.

  Baalroop Pragte Hain Yahan Par.
  You have appeared here in a child form.

  Sankat Wale Aate Jahan Par.
  Where people suffering from troubles come.

  Dakni Shakni Aru Jindni.
  Obstacles like Dakini, Shakini, and Jinn.

  Mashan Chudail Bhoot Bhutni.
  Mashan, witches, ghosts, and spirits.

  Jaake Bhay Te Sab Bhaag Jaate.
  From whose fear, all these flee away.

  Sayane Bhopa Yahan Ghabrate.
  Even the self-proclaimed healers get nervous here.

  Chauki Bandhan Sab Kat Jaate.
  All types of tantric bonds and constraints are cut here.

  Doot Mile Anand Manate.
  Your messengers rejoice here.

  Sachha Hai Darbar Tihara.
  Your court is truly genuine.

  Sharan Pade Sukh Paave Bhara.
  Those who take your refuge find immense happiness.

  Roop Tej Bal Atulit Dhama.
  Your form, radiance, and strength are incomparable.

  Sanmukh Jinke Siya Rama.
  In front of whom Sita-Rama always reside.

  Kanak Mukut Mani Tej Prakasha.
  Your golden crown and jewels shine with radiance.

  Sabki Hovat Purna Aasha.
  You fulfill the hopes of everyone.

  Mahant Ganeshpuri Gunile.
  Mahant Ganeshpuri is your virtuous devotee.

  Bhaye Sevak Ram Rangile.
  Who is colored in the devotion of Lord Ram.

  Adbhut Kala Dikhayi Kaisi.
  What an amazing miracle you have displayed.

  Kalyug Jyoti Jalai Jaisi.
  As if you have lit the lamp of devotion in this Kali Yuga.

  Unchi Dhwaja Pataka Nabh Mein.
  Your high flag is waving in the sky.

  Swarna Kalash Hain Unnat Jag Mein.
  Your golden urns are the most prominent in the world.

  Dharm Satya Ka Danka Baaje.
  The drum of righteousness and truth beats here.

  Siyaram Jai Shankar Raje.
  Siyaram and Lord Shankar reside here.

  Aan Phiraya Mugdar Ghota.
  You carry the mace and club.

  Bhoot Jind Par Padte Sota.
  Which acts as a whip/punishment upon ghosts and spirits.

  Ram Lakshman Siya Hriday Kalyana.
  He in whose heart Ram, Lakshman, and Sita dwell.

  Baal Roop Pragte Hanumana.
  That Hanuman has appeared here in child form.

  Jai Hanumant Hathile Deva.
  Victory to the stubborn/determined Lord Hanuman.

  Puri Pariwar Karat Hain Seva.
  The entire family of devotees is serving you.

  Laddu Churma Mishri Meva.
  Offering of Laddu, Churma, and dry fruits.

  Arzi Darkhast Lagau Deva.
  I place my application/prayer before you, O Lord.

  Daya Kare Sab Vidhi Balaji.
  O Balaji, show mercy in every way.

  Sankat Haran Pragte Balaji.
  Balaji has appeared to destroy all troubles.

  Jai Baba Ki Jan Jan Oochare.
  Everyone chants 'Victory to Baba'.

  Kotik Jan Tere Aaye Dware.
  Crores of people come to your doorstep.

  Baal Samay Ravi Bhakshahi Leenha.
  In your childhood, you swallowed the Sun.

  Timir May Jag Kinho Teena.
  Which caused darkness in the entire world.

  Devan Vinti Ki Ati Bhari.
  The Gods made a great plea to you.

  Chhad Diyo Ravi Kasht Nihari.
  Seeing their trouble, you released the Sun.

  Laanghi Udadhi Siya Sudhi Laye.
  You crossed the ocean and brought news of Sita.

  Lakshman Hit Sanjeevan Laye.
  You brought the Sanjeevani herb for Lakshman.

  Ramanuj Pran Diwakar.
  You are the light (sun) that saved Lakshman's life.

  Shankar Suvan Maa Anjani Chakar.
  You are the incarnation of Shankar and the servant of Mother Anjani.

  Keshari Nandan Dukh Bhav Bhanjan.
  Keshari Nandan, destroyer of worldly sorrows.

  Ramanand Sada Sukh Sandan.
  Who always bestows happiness.

  Siya Ram Ke Pran Piyare.
  You are beloved to the soul of Sita and Ram.

  Jab Baba Ki Bhakt Oochare.
  When devotees call out your name.

  Sankat Dukh Bhanjan Bhagwana.
  O Lord, destroyer of troubles and sorrows.

  Daya Karahu He Kripa Nidhara.
  Show mercy, O treasury of grace.

  Sumar Baal Roop Kalyana.
  Remembering your child form is auspicious.

  Kare Manorath Purna Kama.
  It fulfills all desires.

  Asht Siddhi Nav Nidhi Datari.
  You are the giver of the eight powers and nine treasures.

  Bhakt Jan Aave Bahu Bhari.
  Therefore, devotees come here in great numbers.

  Meva Aru Mishthan Pravina.
  Offering dry fruits and sweets.

  Bhaint Chadhave Dhani Aru Deena.
  Both the rich and the poor offer their gifts.

  Nritya Kare Nit Nyare Nyare.
  Devotees dance wonderfully here.

  Riddhi Siddhiyan Jaake Dware.
  Riddhi and Siddhi (prosperity and perfection) always dwell at your door.

  Arzi Ka Aadesh Milte Hi.
  As soon as the order of the application is received.

  Bhairav Bhoot Pakadte Tabhi.
  Bhairav immediately catches the ghosts.

  Kotwal Kaptan Kripani.
  The Kotwal, Captain, and Pretraj.

  Pretraj Sankat Kalyani.
  Are the ones who resolve all troubles.

  Chauki Bandhan Katte Bhai.
  Brother, all bonds and constraints are cut here.

  Jo Jan Karte Hain Sevakai.
  For those who perform your service.

  Ramdas Baal Bhagwanta.
  The servant of Ram and the Child God.

  Mehndipur Pragte Hanumanta.
  Hanuman has appeared in Mehndipur.

  Jo Jan Balaji Mein Aate.
  Those who come to Balaji.

  Janam Janam Ke Paap Nashate.
  Their sins of many lifetimes are destroyed.

  Jal Paavan Lekar Ghar Jaate.
  Taking the holy water home.

  Nirmal Ho Anand Manate.
  They become pure and rejoice.

  Kroor Kathin Sankat Bhag Jaave.
  Even cruel and difficult troubles run away.

  Satya Dharm Path Raah Dikhave.
  You show the path of truth and righteousness.

  Jo Sat Paath Kare Chalisa.
  Those who read this Chalisa with truth.

  Taapar Prasann Hoye Bagisa.
  Bageshwar (Balaji) is pleased with them.

  Kalyan Sanehi, Sneh Se Gaave.
  Kalyan Sanehi sings it with love.

  Sukh Samridhi Riddhi Siddhi Paave.
  And attains happiness, prosperity, and success.

  Doha
  Mand Buddhi Mam Jaanke, Kshama Karo Gunkhan.
  Considering me dull-witted, forgive me, O treasure of virtues.

  Sankat Mochan Kshamahu Mam, Das Sanehi Kalyan.
  O Reliever of troubles, forgive Das Sanehi and bless him.

faq.q1: What is the main benefit of reciting the Balaji Chalisa?
faq.a1: Reciting the Balaji Chalisa brings happiness, prosperity, and financial stability. It is helpful in removing sorrows and providing mental peace to devotees.
faq.q2: Which day is the most auspicious to read the Balaji Chalisa?
faq.a2: Saturday and Tuesday are considered the most auspicious and fruitful days for the worship of Lord Balaji and the recitation of his Chalisa.
faq.q3: Can it be read at home?
faq.a3: Yes, you can recite it at your home shrine with full devotion and purity. It is not mandatory to visit a temple for this.
faq.q4: Does reciting it help in getting debt relief?
faq.a4: Balaji is considered the remover of obstacles and one who improves the financial condition of his devotees. Reciting the Chalisa with full faith helps in overcoming such hurdles.
faq.a5: Regular recitation increases devotion and concentration. If you can read it daily, it is highly auspicious.
